# kCFProxyTypeKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFProxyTypeKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxytypekey)

-  kCFProxyTypeKey 

Global Variable# kCFProxyTypeKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFProxyTypeKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfproxytypekey#Discussion)

Specifies the type of proxy. The value can be any of the values listed in [Proxy Types](/documentation/cfnetwork/proxy-types).
